title: ferray-core: no nonzero/argwhere/flatnonzero
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.nonzero(arr) returns a tuple of index arrays for each axis where elements are non-zero. np.argwhere returns coordinates as rows. np.flatnonzero returns flat indices. These are in numpy._core.fromnumeric. ferray has no equivalents. These are needed for sparse array construction, conditional selection, and implementing the single-argument form of np.where.
